    eBird
     1 Holyrood Park (Janet Davis) "Distinctive red shield and bicolored red bill with yellow tip. Foraging along shore. Poor iPhone photo."

    More info
    eBird
     5 Warriston Cemetery and Puddocky (Sam Shutt) "Including one juvenile that was snitched by a gull. It was pretty brutal, especially as the parents furiously attacked the gull while it swallowed it whole."

     4 Holyrood Park (Janet Davis)
  • Mediterranean Gull
    More info
    eBird
     3 Portobello Promenade (Janet Davis) "Breeding plumage. Black hood, noticeable white eye arcs, bright orange-red bill and leges. Larger than Back-headed Gull."

  • Sparrowhawk
    More info
    eBird
     1 Holyrood Park (Janet Davis) "Accipiter suddenly dove into brush after prey along nearby brushy hillside as I watched at fairly close range. Unsuccessful. Flew out with no prey and flew to top of ridge and perched in small tree. Moltin[...]"
  • Sparrowhawk
    More info
    eBird
     3 Warriston Cemetery and Puddocky (Sam Shutt) "Both juveniles confident enough to explore the surrounding branches around the nest. They'll probably fledge in the next few days."
